commands.review_summary:
The branch makes embedded PI skip-discovery model resolution try bundled static catalog rows before dynamic provider hooks, enables that fallback in runEmbeddedPiAgent, and adds focused model-resolution coverage.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +46. Total +56 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: no. live failing reproduction was run in this read-only review; the linked issue log shows a 33.7s model-resolution stage and current main resolves skip-discovery dynamically before any static fallback. The PR proof exercises the fixed runtime entrypoint and shows the static Moonshot row resolving without models.json.
